name: Generate and email PDF invoices from Stripe payments with PDFBolt

parameters.content:
## Generate and email Stripe invoices with PDFBolt
This workflow runs when a Stripe invoice is paid, maps the Stripe invoice data to a PDFBolt template, generates a PDF, and emails it to the customer.

### Setup
Connect Stripe, add your PDFBolt API key from https://app.pdfbolt.com/api-keys, and connect Gmail. Create your own invoice template or pick a ready-to-use template from the Template Gallery at https://app.pdfbolt.com/templates. Publish the template, copy its Template ID, and paste it into the PDFBolt node.

## Prepare invoice data
The Stripe Trigger receives the paid invoice event. The Code node maps the Stripe invoice object into `templateData` for your PDFBolt template.

## Generate and send PDF
PDFBolt uses the Direct endpoint and returns the generated PDF in the binary field `data`. Gmail sends that file as the invoice attachment.

parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Prepare invoice data').item.json.customerName }},

Please find invoice {{ $('Prepare invoice data').item.json.invoiceNumber }} attached.

Total amount: {{ $('Prepare invoice data').item.json.totalAmount }}.

Thank you.
parameters.subject: ={{ 'Invoice ' + $('Prepare invoice data').item.json.invoiceNumber }}
